_comment: Copy this to data/mosdac_config.json (gitignored) and fill in your MOSDAC credentials. Used by `make insat-real` / `python -m data.ingest_insat --source real` to fetch INSAT-3D LST granules via data/mosdac_client.py (native client). Register + get account APPROVAL at https://www.mosdac.gov.in/ first (search is public; DOWNLOAD needs an approved account). Key names match ISRO's actual mdapi client: note 'username/email' (not 'username'), 'skip_user_input', 'generate_error_logs'. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD; INSAT-3D LST exists from ~2014 onward, so pick a window within 2014..2023 that overlaps the trained cube (2000-2023). boundingBox is minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat for the Delhi-NCR pilot.
